sections.heading: Drag and Drop Configuration for Symbols

paragraphs: Here you can specify which control should be displayed when you drag and drop a symbol directly from the Symbol Explorer to a panel. You can select different controls for the various symbol types.
Only the permissible controls are displayed for each symbol type.
tables: Signal with a length of 1 bit.
Signals of type IEEE float and IEEE double Signals of type integer with offset not equal to 0 and/or factor not equal to 1 Environmental variables of type float System variables of type float
Signals of type signed/unsigned (with offset of 0 and factor of 1) Environmental and system variables of type integer
System variables of type integer array.
Environmental variables of type string System variables of type string
Whole-number signals to which a value table has been assigned Whole-number environmental variables to which a value table has been assigned
